description: Manual validation register. Each entry links a flagged event (event_id = <city_id>:<date>:<category>) to independent evidence. Status vocabulary: validated (independent observation confirms the condition), corroborated (indirect/partial support, e.g. news reports), unverified (not yet checked), contradicted (independent evidence disagrees with the reanalysis flag). Misses are recorded, not deleted — the register doubles as the tool's published error log.
